description: Destroy tool that regenerates a service token by design; only request/validation is compared. Pins cluster_id-required (through the bypass), the confirm-alone destroy gate, and the bypassed DELETE.

cases.name: confirm alone hits the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_lke_service_token_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
